# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# Chart.yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: webapp
description: A Helm chart for our web application
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

---
# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: webapp
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  tag: "1.0.0"

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

ingress:
  enabled: false

# Database configuration
# IMPORTANT: Default credentials are for development/demo ONLY.
# For production, override via --set or external secret management.
# Example: helm install myapp ./webapp --set database.existingSecret=my-prod-secret
database:
  host: postgres
  port: 5432
  name: webapp
  # If existingSecret is set, it takes precedence over inline credentials.
  # The secret must contain keys: db-username and db-password
  existingSecret: ""
  # These defaults are ONLY used when existingSecret is not provided.
  # They are stored in a Kubernetes Secret (base64-encoded, not plaintext in env).
  defaultCredentials:
    username: admin
    password: DefaultPass123

# Pod security context - run as non-root
podSecurityContext:
  runAsNonRoot: true
  runAsUser: 1000
  runAsGroup: 1000
  fsGroup: 1000

# Container security context - hardened
containerSecurityContext:
  allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
  readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
  runAsNonRoot: true
  runAsUser: 1000
  capabilities:
    drop:
      - ALL
  seccompProfile:
    type: RuntimeDefault

resources:
  limits:
    cpu: 500m
    memory: 256Mi
  requests:
    cpu: 100m
    memory: 128Mi

serviceAccount:
  create: true
  automount: false
  annotations: {}
  name: ""

networkPolicy:
  enabled: true

---
# templates/_helpers.tpl
{{- define "webapp.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride }}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- $name := default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride }}
{{- if contains $name .Release.Name }}
{{- .Release.Name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name $name | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{- define "webapp.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
{{- end }}

{{- define "webapp.labels" -}}
helm.sh/chart: {{ printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" }}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "webapp.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
app.kubernetes.io/version: {{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion | quote }}
app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
{{- end }}

{{- define "webapp.selectorLabels" -}}
app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "webapp.name" . }}
app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
{{- end }}

{{- define "webapp.serviceAccountName" -}}
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
{{- default (include "webapp.fullname" .) .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- else }}
{{- default "default" .Values.serviceAccount.name }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

{{- define "webapp.dbSecretName" -}}
{{- if .Values.database.existingSecret }}
{{- .Values.database.existingSecret }}
{{- else }}
{{- printf "%s-db-credentials" (include "webapp.fullname" .) }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/secret.yaml
{{- if not .Values.database.existingSecret }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{ printf "%s-db-credentials" (include "webapp.fullname" .) }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    helm.sh/hook: pre-install,pre-upgrade
    helm.sh/resource-policy: keep
    "helm.sh/hook-weight": "-5"
    # Warning annotation to flag default credentials
    webapp.io/credential-source: "default-values-NOT-FOR-PRODUCTION"
type: Opaque
data:
  db-username: {{ .Values.database.defaultCredentials.username | b64enc | quote }}
  db-password: {{ .Values.database.defaultCredentials.password | b64enc | quote }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/serviceaccount.yaml
{{- if .Values.serviceAccount.create }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.serviceAccountName" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- with .Values.serviceAccount.annotations }}
  annotations:
    {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
automountServiceAccountToken: {{ .Values.serviceAccount.automount }}
{{- end }}

---
# templates/deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        # Force rollout on secret change
        checksum/secret: {{ include (print $.Template.BasePath "/secret.yaml") . | sha256sum }}
      labels:
        {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 8 }}
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: {{ include "webapp.serviceAccountName" . }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        {{- toYaml .Values.podSecurityContext | nindent 8 }}
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          securityContext:
            {{- toYaml .Values.containerSecurityContext | nindent 12 }}
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: DB_HOST
              value: {{ .Values.database.host | quote }}
            - name: DB_PORT
              value: {{ .Values.database.port | quote }}
            - name: DB_NAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.name | quote }}
            # Credentials injected from Secret - never as plaintext env values in manifests
            - name: DB_USERNAME
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ include "webapp.dbSecretName" . }}
                  key: db-username
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ include "webapp.dbSecretName" . }}
                  key: db-password
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          resources:
            {{- toYaml .Values.resources | nindent 12 }}
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 64Mi

---
# templates/service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: http
      protocol: TCP
      name: http
  selector:
    {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 4 }}

---
# templates/networkpolicy.yaml
{{- if .Values.networkPolicy.enabled }}
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: {{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      {{- include "webapp.selectorLabels" . | nindent 6 }}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - ports:
        - port: 8080
          protocol: TCP
  egress:
    # Allow DNS resolution
    - ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
    # Allow database connection
    - ports:
        - port: {{ .Values.database.port }}
          protocol: TCP
{{- end }}

---
# templates/tests/test-connection.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: "{{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}-test-connection"
  labels:
    {{- include "webapp.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
  annotations:
    "helm.sh/hook": test
spec:
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
  containers:
    - name: wget
      image: busybox:1.36
      command: ['wget']
      args: ['{{ include "webapp.fullname" . }}:{{ .Values.service.port }}/healthz', '-O', '/dev/null', '-T', '5']
      securityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
  restartPolicy: Never

---
# templates/NOTES.txt
# This file provides post-install instructions
# Contents:
#
# Thank you for installing {{ .Chart.Name }}!
#
# Your release is named: {{ .Release.Name }}
#
# {{- if not .Values.database.existingSecret }}
# ⚠️  WARNING: You are using DEFAULT database credentials.
# These are intended for development and demos ONLY.
#
# For production, create a Kubernetes Secret and reference it:
#
#   kubectl create secret generic my-prod-db-secret \
#     --from-literal=db-username='<PROD_USER>' \
#     --from-literal=db-password='<PROD_PASSWORD>'
#
#   helm upgrade {{ .Release.Name }} ./webapp \
#     --set database.existingSecret=my-prod-db-secret
#
# Or use an external secrets operator (e.g., External Secrets, Sealed Secrets, Vault).
# {{- else }}
# ✅ Using external secret: {{ .Values.database.existingSecret }}
# {{- end }}
